selected_feature.title: TopDownLens contract
selected_feature.summary: Define the first module contract for ontology, storage topology, graph projection, and BMAD handoff.

source_context.reason: Carries the product thesis and success criteria.
Defines the storage topology and core data contracts.
Shows the candidate capability this feature supports.

include: Define contracts for ontology, relationships, landscape entities, derived graph, and BMAD packet handoff.
exclude: Do not implement the full future TopDownLens runtime in this packet.
guardrails: BMAD must plan and build only the selected feature represented by selected_feature.id.
References resolve by stable IDs; paths are mutable context.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Packet targets exactly one selected vertical feature.
